name: PNVA-Core professional public repository
author: Gustavo de Aguiar Martins
claim: Local live-field PNVA/no-tick validation with production-candidate PASS and auditable sanitized proof logs.

post_temporal_layer.claim: PNVA as post-temporal causal decision architecture for machines and institutions, with explicit limits.

semantic_consistency_guard.hash_policy: semantic guard consumes attestation and is excluded from the attestation seed to avoid circular hashing

schema_contract_validation.legacy_warning_policy: canonical bridge warnings are preserved as explicit legacy migration warnings; native runtime scope must remain error-free and warning-light

causal_chronology.legacy_warning_policy: canonical bridge chronology warnings are preserved as legacy migration evidence; native runtime events must remain monotonic and clean

tension_decision_calibration.legacy_warning_policy: canonical bridge calibration warnings are preserved as migration evidence; native runtime calibration must remain error-free

decision_trace_index.legacy_warning_policy: canonical bridge low-authority traces are preserved as migration evidence; native decision traces must remain complete and hard-authority clean

heuristic_influence_map.legacy_warning_policy: canonical bridge low-authority heuristic influence is preserved as migration evidence; native strong decisions must remain hard-authority covered

entity_no_tick_matrix.legacy_warning_policy: canonical bridge low-authority strong decisions are preserved as migration evidence; native entity no-tick matrix must remain error-free

suppression_ledger.legacy_warning_policy: canonical bridge above-threshold suppressions are preserved as migration evidence; native suppression must remain proof-backed and below threshold

sovereign_robustness_gate.legacy_warning_policy: canonical bridge debt is preserved as bounded migration evidence; native regressions are blockers

r3_migration_plan.legacy_warning_policy: R3 requires replacing future legacy H0/H1 strong decisions and bridge-normalized warnings with native hard-authority pnva.event.v1 evidence

authority_migration_ledger.legacy_warning_policy: historical H0 strong decisions remain visible; future strong decisions must be emitted through native hard-authority pnva.event.v1 rules

r3_authority_projection.legacy_warning_policy: projection is an implementation contract; fresh runtime evidence is still required before claiming R3 legacy-free

r3_cutover_gate.legacy_warning_policy: R3 cutover is approved for the slot-bound native runtime replacement sample while historical legacy evidence remains preserved as migration context

r3_runtime_capture_matrix.legacy_warning_policy: R3 runtime capture is complete for the public slot-bound native runtime sample; projected evidence remains preserved as earlier implementation contract context

r3_runtime_evidence_guard.legacy_warning_policy: R3 runtime evidence guard accepted the public native runtime JSONL with projection forbidden and all no-tick pairs intact

r3_runtime_instrumentation_plan.legacy_warning_policy: R3 runtime instrumentation plan remains ready and records that the public native runtime JSONL was emitted and accepted

r3_runtime_contract_validation.legacy_warning_policy: R3 runtime contract validation remains ready with the accepted native runtime JSONL and downstream validators

sovereign_evolution_ledger.legacy_warning_policy: The evolution ledger keeps all historical legacy warnings visible while approving the slot-bound native R3 runtime replacement sample

reproducibility_guard.hash_policy: reproducibility guard consumes attestation and semantic consistency and is excluded from the attestation seed to avoid circular hashing

root_sovereignty_guard.legacy_warning_policy: The root guard consumes traceability, attestation, audit and reproducibility without entering the attestation seed, then proves the public R3 runtime sample is native, paired, entity-bound and non-projected

root_causal_intelligence.legacy_warning_policy: This analyzer turns public no-tick logs, entity coverage, heuristic authority and proof integrity into deterministic root intelligence while preserving historical warnings as migration context

root_traceability_matrix.legacy_warning_policy: The traceability matrix turns each R3 runtime slot into an auditable entity, heuristic, no-tick and proof row; invalid rows become root blockers

root_adversarial_sentry.legacy_warning_policy: The sentry mutates only temporary evidence copies and proves root validators reject corrupted runtime evidence without changing public PASS artifacts

root_release_seal.legacy_warning_policy: The root release seal is outside the attestation seed and provides a final citation hash over root readiness, traceability, adversarial rejection, reproducibility, semantic agreement, audit and runtime acceptance

root_release_verifier.legacy_warning_policy: The verifier consumes the root release seal from outside the seal hash and proves the public citation hash, artifact classifications, checksum coverage and claim boundaries still hold

root_claim_boundary_guard.legacy_warning_policy: The claim boundary guard stays outside the root release seal and verifies that public language remains inside explicit evidence boundaries before posting or indexing

root_publication_gate.legacy_warning_policy: The publication gate validates the public package after seal, verifier and claim-boundary guard, while excluding its own live report from self-referential checksum comparison

root_dependency_graph.legacy_warning_policy: The dependency graph validates that the public proof package is ordered, acyclic and reachable from the final publication gate without extending the release claims

root_observability_index.legacy_warning_policy: The observability index is a post-seal laboratory dashboard over public reports; it does not change the root release seal or claim private deployment validation

root_invariant_firewall.legacy_warning_policy: The invariant firewall is a post-seal regression blocker over public reports; it preserves root invariants without changing the root release seal

root_regression_sentinel.legacy_warning_policy: The regression sentinel watches future metric drift after the invariant firewall passes, without changing the root release seal

root_proof_theorem_ledger.legacy_warning_policy: The proof theorem ledger turns root PASS reports into citable theorem cards without changing the root release seal

root_evolution_governor.legacy_warning_policy: The evolution governor defines advisory future-improvement cards with locked invariants and no live system execution

root_heuristic_weight_ledger.legacy_warning_policy: The heuristic weight ledger publishes audit weights and governance status without exposing private production tuning

root_entity_capability_ledger.legacy_warning_policy: The entity capability ledger publishes cataloged capability readiness without executing live system actions

root_field_topology_ledger.legacy_warning_policy: The field topology ledger publishes an audit graph and does not execute live system actions

root_no_tick_causal_contract.legacy_warning_policy: The no-tick causal contract accepts canonical threshold exceptions only as bounded historical evidence, never as native or R3 runtime behavior

root_runtime_admission_controller.legacy_warning_policy: The runtime admission controller admits only restricted planning and evidence ingestion; live execution remains outside this public audit layer

root_entity_heuristic_admission_matrix.legacy_warning_policy: The matrix admits entity-rule growth only through explicit proof-covered edge classes

root_admission_negative_controls.legacy_warning_policy: The negative controls mutate only temporary copies and do not alter live evidence

root_event_identity_ledger.legacy_warning_policy: The event identity ledger audits public event streams and does not alter live gates or runtime workloads

root_runtime_growth_budget.legacy_warning_policy: The growth budget audits public evidence only and does not alter live gates or runtime workloads

root_causal_mesh_ledger.legacy_warning_policy: The causal mesh ledger cross-counts public PASS reports and does not alter live gates or runtime workloads

root_efficiency_proof_ledger.legacy_warning_policy: The efficiency proof ledger audits public event evidence only and does not alter live gates or runtime workloads

root_equation_consistency_ledger.legacy_warning_policy: The equation consistency ledger audits public tension fields only and does not alter live gates or runtime workloads

root_legacy_quarantine_ledger.legacy_warning_policy: The legacy quarantine ledger audits public evidence only and does not alter live gates or runtime workloads

root_evidence_chronology_ledger.legacy_warning_policy: The chronology ledger audits report ordering and does not alter live gates or runtime workloads

root_sovereign_readiness_gate.legacy_warning_policy: The readiness gate audits public evidence only and does not alter live gates or runtime workloads

root_validator_registry.legacy_warning_policy: The validator registry audits root validator discoverability and does not alter live gates or runtime workloads

sovereign_evidence_attestation.hash_policy: sovereign audit consumes this attestation and is excluded from the attestation seed to avoid circular hashing

google_search_console_layer.truth_boundary: Search Console can request crawling and expose diagnostics, but cannot guarantee instant indexing, ranking, or AI answer adoption.

google_search_console_operator.manual_boundary: Search Console ownership, URL Inspection live test and Request Indexing click require a verified Google account session.

ai_search_entity_pass.canonical_answer: Gustavo Martins PNVA refers to PNVA-Core, a post-temporal causal no-tick architecture for state/event-oriented computation authored by Gustavo de Aguiar Martins.
ai_search_entity_pass.external_boundary: Google ranking and GPT answer adoption are external crawler/index outcomes and are not claimed until observed.

indexnow_distribution.truth_boundary: IndexNow notifies participating search engines; Google indexing still requires Search Console.

public_data_policy.published: sanitized proof summaries and public documentation
public_data_policy.not_published: raw local proofs, sensitive environment paths, commercial tuning and private thresholds
